mapper.insert: insert into orders (order_number,car_id,rental_start_time, rental_end_time,pickup_date,return_date, pickup_location,return_location,user_id, insurance_type,total_price,discount, payment_status,created_at,updated_at) values (#{orderNumber},#{carId},#{rentalStartTime}, #{rentalEndTime},#{pickupDate},#{returnDate}, #{pickupLocation},#{returnLocation},#{userId}, #{insuranceType},#{totalPrice},#{discount}, #{paymentStatus},#{createAt},#{updateAt})
